uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds ATH frame; expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js (Temperature 22.5, Humidity 55.3) mapped to air.temperature / air.relativeHumidity.

uplink.description: ATH report-on-change decrease: negative temperature -2.5 C / 40 %RH
uplink._note: Synthetic; exercises the upstream >127 sign flip (Convert mode 1): combined 130.5 -> -(130.5-128) = -2.5. Expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Supervisory: battery 3.6 V, no flags, accumulation 261
uplink._note: Synthetic; upstream Battery string "3.6V" -> battery 3.6 V; byte4 0x36, accumulation bytes[9..10]=1,5 -> 261. Expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Supervisory: tamper since reset + current tamper + low battery, 2.9 V
uplink._note: Synthetic; byte2 0x1A sets TamperSinceLastReset(bit4)+TamperState(bit3)+BatteryLow(bit1); upstream flags 1/0 mapped to booleans; "2.9V" -> 2.9. Expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js.
Synthetic; byte2 0 -> "Open" per upstream TAMPER_EVENT. Expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Link quality: subband 2, RSSI -56 dBm, SNR 7
uplink._note: Synthetic; upstream RSSI = -256 + byte3 = -256 + 200 = -56. Expected from running reference/upstream-codec.js.

uplink.description: Unsupported message type returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic; byte1 0x99 is not a RadioBridge event type. Upstream returns the placeholder {Event:"UNDEFINED"}, which violates the output contract, so this codec returns an error instead.
